name: AJ Smith Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at AJ Smith Recreation Center in Tecumseh, MI! There are 5 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Blissfield Middle School
description: Blissfield Middle School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Blissfield, MI. There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include lights. The court is free.

name: Frank and Shirley Dick Family YMCA
description: Frank and Shirley Dick Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Adrian, MI. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Heritage Park
description: Heritage Park is a place to play pickleball in Adrian, MI. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.
